mapper.select: SELECT s.*, cd_st.code_label AS site_type_cd_nm, cd_ss.code_label AS site_status_cd_nm FROM sy_site s LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_st ON cd_st.code_grp = 'SITE_TYPE' AND cd_st.code_value = s.site_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ss ON cd_ss.code_grp = 'SITE_STATUS' AND cd_ss.code_value = s.site_status_cd WHERE s.site_id = #{id}
